summary: Iteration 85 - Dashboard PDF Export Feature Testing Complete. All 15 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend Export PDF button verified with correct data-testid and gold styling. PDF endpoint returns valid PDF with all required sections: Indicateurs Cles (8 KPIs), REDD+ & MRV (5 levels + practices), SSRTE & ICI (risk grid + remediation), Risque par Zone (10 actual village names), Tendances Mensuelles (6 months). All text in French.

issues: Console warning: recharts width/height -1 on initial render (cosmetic, charts render correctly after)

critical_code_review_comments: PASS: Backend GET /api/cooperative/pdf/dashboard-report returns 200 with Content-Type: application/pdf
PASS: PDF file size 6446 bytes (reasonable size)
PASS: PDF starts with %PDF magic bytes (valid PDF)
PASS: Content-Disposition header includes attachment and .pdf filename
PASS: PDF requires authentication (401/403 without token)
PASS: 'Indicateurs Cles' section with 8 KPIs (Membres 20/20, Superficie 175.5 ha, REDD+ 17 visits, Score 4.9/10, SSRTE 18 visits, Enfants 20, Couverture 80%, Cas ICI 7)
PASS: REDD+ & MRV section with 5 levels (Excellence 0, Avance 3, Intermediaire 11, Debutant 2, Non conforme 1)
PASS: Practices adoption (Agroforesterie 61%, Compostage 61%, Couverture sol 83%, Zero brulage 78%)
PASS: SSRTE & ICI risk grid (Critique 2, Eleve 4, Modere 4, Faible 8)
PASS: ICI Remediation table (7 total, 3 resolved, 2 in progress, 42.9% rate)
PASS: Risque par Zone with 10 actual village names (Duékoue, Guiglo, Daloa, Soubre, San Pedro, Gagnoa, Divo, Issia, Bouafle, Vavoua) - NO 'Inconnu'
PASS: Tendances Mensuelles with 6 months of data (Oct 2025 - Mar 2026)
PASS: Frontend Export PDF button visible with data-testid='export-pdf-btn'
PASS: Export PDF button has gold styling (text-[#D4AF37], border-[#D4AF37]/30)
PASS: All 4 charts still render (redd-evolution-chart, ssrte-trends-chart, risk-zone-chart, practices-donut-chart)
PASS: REDD+ widget shows Score 4.9, 17 visits, 18 farmers
PASS: SSRTE widget shows 18 visits, 20 enfants, 80% couverture

success_rate.frontend: 100% (Export PDF button + 4 charts + KPI widgets verified)

seed_data_creation: Used existing seed data from iteration 84
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 85 added PDF export feature. Backend endpoint GET /api/cooperative/pdf/dashboard-report generates complete reportlab PDF with cooperative branding. Frontend button at data-testid='export-pdf-btn' in dashboard header. PDF contains all KPIs, REDD+ levels, practices adoption, SSRTE risk grid, ICI remediation, risk by zone (actual village names), and 6 months of trends. All text in French. Cooperative dashboard accessible at /cooperative/dashboard (not /cooperative).

mocked_api_note.Orange Money API: MOCKED - payments logged but not actually processed
mocked_api_note.Orange SMS API: MOCKED - SMS logged but not sent
